title: Spawner Craft
body:
This datapack adds new recipes that make all of the spawn eggs craftable. Use the eggs to customize your mob spawner! the "Coins" are rotten flesh (part of my texture pack)

## Loaders

- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/spawner-craft)
- **Datapack**

## How to Use

- Craft a spawner
- Place spawner on the ground, Right-Click while holding
- Craft any spawn egg of your choice.
- While holding the spawn egg Right-Click on the spawner to make that spawner spawn that mob!
 
## Commands

gives info in-game about the datapack and where to find things
```
/trigger SpawnerCraftInfo
```

## FAQ

### How do I craft the custom spawn eggs?

In v1.12.0 the custom spawn eggs have been removed since Mojang has finally added the Iron and Snow Golem Spawn Eggs.

### How do I craft a Wither or Ender Dragon Spawn Egg?

Since these spawn eggs are only obtainable using commands I figured it would be unsafe to add them in as crafting recipes and I removed them from the custom drop crafting.

### My Spawner is not spawning any mobs even though I can see the mob spinning inside.

To spawn a certain mob it needs to match a few conditions that are different for most mobs. For example; a zombie spawner needs to be dark (light level 0) while for pigs you need to have grass around the spawner or water for a fish to spawn. You can probably Google and figure out which conditions are needed to spawn said mob.

### Can I add this to my mod pack?

Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?

I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
